title: The Dazzling Sand Dunes That Sing

scenes.text: These dunes hum with the wind – a natural phenomenon!
scenes.query: Dunas de Maspalomas maspalomas dunes sound

scenes.text: These are the Dunas de Maspalomas, located on Gran Canaria, Spain.
The dunes can reach heights of up to 10 meters and shift with the wind.
scenes.query: Dunas de Maspalomas maspalomas dunes height

scenes.text: Listen closely as the sands 'sing' when disturbed.
scenes.query: Dunas de Maspalomas maspalomas dunes sound
scenes.label: THE SAND'S SONG

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.
scenes.query: Dunas de Maspalomas maspalomas dunes sunset

description: 📍 Dunas de Maspalomas, Gran Canaria - Spain. Stunning dunes that create a mesmerizing sound when the wind blows. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
